# SchemaZap

> SchemaZap converts SQL DDL into interactive visual database schema diagrams.

Use SchemaZap to parse `CREATE TABLE` statements from MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and MariaDB; explore detected table relationships; edit the diagram; and export it as a PNG image.

## Application

- [SchemaZap](https://schemazap.alexisgvrcia.dev/): Web application for converting SQL DDL into database diagrams.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/alexisgvrcia/schema-zap/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, supported SQL dialects, features, and local setup.

## Optional

- [Source repository](https://github.com/alexisgvrcia/schema-zap): Source code and issue tracker.
